repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho: fixed-rho continuous GPN envelope left sharpness/measurable pasting unresolved for a different event

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2009DTEConfidenceSets and BartlKupperLuxPapapantoleon2022Dependence do not prove strict-event endpoint attainment/measurable selection for causal Spearman-band benefit bounds

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho: fixed-rho GPN threshold algebra, not Spearman-band probability-of-benefit primal-dual endpoints

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2009DTEConfidenceSets treats known dependence-measure DTE bounds; Kellerer1984Duality supplies the duality template

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho: inverse rho-star for GPN, not majority-benefit sign envelopes over a Spearman band

published_prior_art.cite: FirpoRidder2019Functionals motivates direct functional bounds but does not give a concordance-band majority-sign envelope

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_bound_intersection_inference was an unfilled failed scaffold; no in-catalogue sieve endpoint theorem

published_prior_art.cite: FanPark2010DTEBounds gives plug-in inference for Makarov endpoints, not finite-cell Spearman-rank-moment transport endpoints

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_gpn_continuous_rho has a one-sided inverse-threshold CI conjecture, not a directional endpoint law for Spearman-band transport bounds

published_prior_art.cite: ImbensManski2004PartialCI and Stoye2009MoreCI require endpoint limit theory as input; FanPark2010DTEBounds supplies the closest fewer-than-n bootstrap precedent

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Theorem 1 and Theorem 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Assumption ass:sharp-endpoint-attainment supplies endpoint attainment, closed conditional value intervals, and measurable selectors.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The sharp primal-dual interval and majority-sign iff are accepted only as conditional on ass:sharp-endpoint-attainment; the unconditional kernel is Conjecture 1.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Conjecture 2
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Stable dual faces and local empirical/bootstrap sieve remainder are maintained high-level regularity conditions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The inference claim is accepted only as a conditional endpoint-law conjecture under ass:stable-dual and ass:local-sieve.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add one sentence in §8 after Theorem 1 explicitly stating that Theorem 1 is supporting field-tier content and cannot be promoted as the headline without proving Conjecture 1.

Add a finite two-by-two or three-by-three rank-grid example computing the Spearman-band LP endpoint, even though field tier does not require SC10; it would make the gap versus known-dependence Fan-Park sharper.
Sharpen Conjecture 1 by naming the exact measurable-selection theorem or upper/lower semicontinuous envelope lemma intended to handle the strict open-set indicator.
For Conjecture 2, state the directional derivative candidate or active-dual-face formula so Stage 0 has a concrete object to verify rather than only a bootstrap-consistency target.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 with the accepted caveats bound: prove Conjecture 1 as the real kernel, and treat Theorems 1-2 only as conditional on endpoint attainment.
